actors.name: $BGT token holders
actors.description: Berachain's decentralized governance system empowers `$BGT` token holders to make important decisions on core functions of Proof-of-Liquidity & other core dApps.
capabilities: make important decisions on core functions of Proof-of-Liquidity & other core dApps
cast their votes during the voting period
delegate `$BGT`

actors.name: Guardians
actors.description: Berachain's guardian system provides an additional layer of security.
capabilities: cancel malicious proposals during the timelock period (e.g., hostile takeover, unauthorized code changes) to protect the Berachain ecosystem
act through a 5-of-9 multisig with elected signers

actors.name: Prospective Validator
actors.description: stakes their `$BERA` as a security bond
capabilities: stakes their `$BERA` as a security bond

actors.name: Validators
actors.description: chosen to propose blocks with a probability proportional to their staked amount
capabilities: propose blocks with a probability proportional to their staked amount
receive both a base emission and a variable reward emission based on their boost percentage
direct the remaining variable `$BGT` rewards to whitelisted Reward Vaults of their choosing
receive protocol-provided Incentives from Reward Vaults
share their received protocol Incentives with delegators to attract more boosts
stake $BERA
operate a validator
earn block rewards
direct $BGT emissions to Reward Vaults
capture Incentives from Reward Vaults
take a percentage (Commission Rate) of the Incentives captured

actors.name: Liquidity providers
actors.description: play a crucial role in PoL
capabilities: provide liquidity to protocols like BEX
receive receipt tokens as proof of their contribution
stake receipt tokens in Reward Vaults
earn `$BGT` proportional to their share of the vault

actors.name: BGT Holders
capabilities: delegate them to validators
directly influencing the validator's boost

actors.name: Users
actors.description: Earn `$BGT` by providing liquidity, then delegate to validators who maximize returns
capabilities: Earn `$BGT` by providing liquidity
delegate to validators who maximize returns

actors.name: Token Manager
actors.description: One wallet address is responsible for offering an Incentive Token
capabilities: offer Incentive Tokens

actors.name: Booster
actors.description: Any user that boosts a validator with $BGT
capabilities: boosts a validator with $BGT
receive a portion of Incentives

actors.name: Protocol
actors.description: An entity, group, or organization that offers Incentive tokens for their respective Reward Vault
capabilities: offer Incentive tokens for their respective Reward Vault

actors.name: Depositors
capabilities: receive an increasing amount of `$BGT` daily until rewards reach a saturation point after three days where all rewards are actively being distributed

actors.name: BGT Foundation
capabilities: Reviews proposals weekly

assets.name: $BERA
assets.description: the network token used to pay for transactions on Berachain

assets.name: Reward Vault
assets.description: smart contracts in which users can stake their Proof-of-Liquidity (PoL) eligible assets to receive `$BGT` rewards

assets.name: Incentive tokens
assets.description: project-supplied Incentives provided to attract these emissions

components.name: Berachain Discord
components.description: For any questions or discussion about the Berachain claim

components.name: Governance contracts
components.description: Berachain's governance process is derived from OpenZeppelin's Governance contracts

components.name: BeraHub
components.description: the place to manage all things `$BGT` and access Berachain liquidity through BEX

components.name: Honey Swap
components.description: allows users to trade approved stables and assets for [$HONEY](https://docs.berachain.com/learn/pol/tokens/honey)

components.name: Reward Vaults
components.description: smart contracts in which users can stake their Proof-of-Liquidity (PoL) eligible assets to receive `$BGT` rewards

components.name: BeaconKit
components.description: a modular and customizable consensus layer for Ethereum-based blockchains

components.name: Execution clients
components.description: like Geth, Reth, Erigon, Nethermind, and more to handle executing smart contracts

components.name: Validator Node
components.description: A blockchain node being run to validate transactions, produce blocks and come to consensus with other validators in the network

components.name: Distributor
components.description: Emits $BGT to reward vaults on a per-block basis

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor
components.description: contract that manages the distribution and claiming of incentive tokens

components.name: HoneyFactory
components.description: contract acts as a central hub, connecting all the different `$HONEY` Vaults and is responsible for minting new `$HONEY` tokens

components.name: FeeCollector
components.description: auctions fees collected from dApps for `$WBERA` and then distributes them pro rata to `$BGT` holders who have boosted validators

components.name: BlockRewardController
components.description: Updated constants are found on-chain via BlockRewardController

components.name: Auto-Incentivizer
components.description: fees from foundation vaults will use the fees to automatically offer incentives

data_flows.description: User with sufficient voting power creates a governance proposal.
BGT Holders delegate them to validators
Validators direct a portion of their `$BGT` emissions to specific Reward Vaults of their choice
Users mint $HONEY by depositing whitelisted collateral into a vault
Any user that boosts a validator with $BGT
One wallet address is responsible for offering an Incentive Token

trust_boundaries.name: Validator Trust Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary around the validator node, requiring trust in the operator.

trust_boundaries.name: Smart Contract Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary around smart contracts, requiring validation of code and audits.

behaviors.name: Create Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: Any user with sufficient voting power can create a governance proposal.

behaviors.name: Delegate $BGT
behaviors.description: BGT Holders delegate them to validators

behaviors.name: Direct $BGT emissions
behaviors.description: Validators direct a portion of their `$BGT` emissions to specific Reward Vaults of their choice

behaviors.name: Mint $HONEY
behaviors.description: Users mint $HONEY by depositing whitelisted collateral into a vault

behaviors.name: Boost Validator
behaviors.description: Any user that boosts a validator with $BGT

behaviors.name: Offer Incentive Tokens
behaviors.description: One wallet address is responsible for offering an Incentive Token
